basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Project Assistant (Administration) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitr.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with 5 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Graduation with 5 years of relevant experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 26000/- to Rs. 57000/- + HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the IIT Roorkee Project Assistant (Administration) recruitment is 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant (Administration) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant (Administration) post at IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Graduation degree along with 5 years of relevant experience to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant (Administration) role?
faq.answer: The salary for this post ranges from Rs. 26,000 to Rs. 57,000 per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant (Administration) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of IIT Roorkee.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates need to be attached.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: IIT Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.
